hero.headline: 23 Years Keeping Loudoun Pools Perfect
hero.subheadline: From custom pool builds to weekly maintenance, Albert and Gina have been Loudoun County's trusted pool experts since 2003. Let the family team that earned back-to-back Best of Leesburg honors take care of your backyard -- so you just dive in.

services.label: Our Expertise
services.headline: Full-Service Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block"> Design to Weekly Maintenance
services.subtitle: Whether you are dreaming of a brand-new pool or need reliable weekly service, Countryside handles every detail so you can enjoy crystal-clear water without lifting a finger.

cards.title: Custom Pool Design & Build
cards.description: From concept sketches to your first splash, we design and build stunning residential pools and spas. Most projects completed in just 8 weeks, backed by partnerships with Pebble Tec and Jandy.

cards.title: Weekly Maintenance Programs
cards.description: Thorough weekly care including skimming, vacuuming, chemical balancing, and filter cleaning. Our knowledgeable servicemen keep your pool swim-ready every single week.

cards.title: Equipment Repairs
cards.description: Pumps, filters, heaters, chlorinators, automation systems -- we diagnose and fix it fast. Same-day emergency response available for urgent breakdowns.

cards.title: Pool Renovations
cards.description: Breathe new life into your aging pool with premium resurfacing, updated tile, modern coping, and fresh decking. Pebble Tec authorized partner for lasting beauty.

cards.title: Water Chemistry Management
cards.description: Precise chemical balancing that keeps water safe, crystal clear, and gentle on skin. No red eyes, no irritation -- just perfectly balanced water every visit.

cards.title: Seasonal Opening & Closing
cards.description: Proper winterization and spring opening services to protect your investment through Virginia's changing seasons. Equipment inspection included with every seasonal service.

how_it_works.headline: Your Pool, Our Priority -- In Three Steps

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Assessment
steps.description: Call or fill out the form below. Albert or Gina will personally discuss your pool needs and schedule a convenient on-site visit within days.

steps.title: Get Your Custom Plan
steps.description: We assess your pool, recommend the right service package, and provide honest, transparent pricing. No high-pressure sales -- just straightforward options that fit your budget.

steps.title: Relax and Enjoy
steps.description: Our trained technicians handle everything on a reliable schedule. Your pool stays crystal clear, and if anything ever falls short, we come back and make it right.

about.label: Why Loudoun County Trusts Us
about.headline: Family-Owned, Locally Rooted, and Personally Invested
about.description: Albert and Gina founded Countryside Pool Services in 2003 with a simple belief: pool care should be personal. Over 23 years later, that belief still drives every service call, every custom build, and every repair. As owners who are personally involved in every project, they have built lasting relationships with homeowners across Leesburg and Loudoun County. Our partnerships with Jandy, Zodiac, Polaris, and Pebble Tec mean you get premium equipment installed and maintained by people who know it inside and out.

features.title: Owner-Operated Since 2003
features.description: Albert and Gina are personally involved in every project. You are never handed off to a faceless call center or random subcontractor.

features.title: Premium Brand Partnerships
features.description: Authorized partners with Jandy, Zodiac, Polaris, and Pebble Tec. We use and stand behind the best equipment in the industry.

features.title: Back-to-Back Award Recognition
features.description: Named Best of Leesburg Finalist in both 2024 and 2025. Our neighbors trust us -- and we work every day to earn that trust.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every pool is different, so we tailor plans to your exact needs. Request a free assessment and get a transparent quote -- no hidden fees, no gimmicks.

guarantee.headline: Our "Crystal Clear" Promise
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with any service visit, call us and we will come back to make it right at no extra charge. We have built our reputation over 23 years on doing right by our neighbors, and we are not about to stop now. Your satisfaction is not just a policy -- it is personal to Albert and Gina.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start weekly maintenance?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are scheduled within the same week. For emergency equipment failures, we offer same-day response. Call us at (703) 779-5680 and we will get you on the calendar fast.

faqs.question: Do you build custom pools and spas?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We handle design-build projects from concept to completion. Many of our custom pools are finished in as little as 8 weeks. We will walk you through design options, materials like Pebble Tec, and equipment from Jandy and Zodiac.

faqs.question: What brands of equipment do you work with?
faqs.answer: We are authorized partners with Jandy, Zodiac, Polaris, and Pebble Tec. Whether it is a new installation, repair, or replacement, we use and recommend the most reliable equipment in the industry.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes. Countryside Pool Services is fully licensed and insured, affiliated with the Pool and Hot Tub Association (PHTA), and has been recognized as a Best of Leesburg Finalist in both 2024 and 2025.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We proudly serve Leesburg and the greater Loudoun County area in Virginia. If you are nearby and unsure whether we cover your neighborhood, just give us a call -- we are happy to check.

testimonials.name: Tracey S.
testimonials.text: Hands down the best Pool Company out there. Honest, reliable, and exceptionally priced. We could not be happier with Countryside.

testimonials.name: Hasan I.
testimonials.text: Says what they will do and does what they say. We went from grass to a functioning pool in 8 weeks. Absolutely incredible team.

testimonials.name: Darcy W.
testimonials.text: I can 100% say I trust Countryside Pool Services. Both Albert and Gina are responsive and ensure things are done right. Thank you!

contact.headline:
Ready for a Pool You
Can Count On?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-obligation assessment from Albert and Gina's team. Over 23 years serving Loudoun County -- honest pricing, personal service, and results you can see.

footer.description: Family-owned pool service. Proudly serving Leesburg and Loudoun County since 2003.
